expectations.text: Subject line starts with 'chore:' in lowercase
expectations.evidence: Subject is 'chore: tighten spoke lint discipline and spec-reviewer type-bound caveat' — starts with 'chore:' lowercase

expectations.text: Subject line is 70 characters or fewer
expectations.evidence: 'chore: tighten spoke lint discipline and spec-reviewer type-bound caveat' = 71 characters, exceeds 70-char commitlint limit by 1

expectations.text: A body is present (this chore has a non-obvious why)
expectations.evidence: Body is present with per-file bullet explanations

expectations.text: Body includes a semver impact statement ('no semver impact', 'zero semver impact', or equivalent)
expectations.evidence: Opening line 'Three agent prompt updates, no src/test/exports-map changes:' communicates zero semver impact

expectations.text: Body includes a Co-Authored-By footer with noreply@anthropic.com
